user.title: Configure WattWatcher
user.description: Select a power sensor and define your operational modes. Modes are evaluated in sequence (Mode 1 to 6). Each mode activates when the power is below or equal to its Max Watt threshold.

data.name: Device Name (e.g., PC, Washing Machine)
data.mode_1_max_watt: Mode 1 Max Watt (Active from 0W up to this value)
data.mode_2_max_watt: Mode 2 Max Watt (Must be higher than Mode 1)
data.mode_3_max_watt: Mode 3 Max Watt (Leave empty if this is your final highest mode)
data.mode_4_max_watt: Mode 4 Max Watt (Leave empty if this is your final highest mode)
data.mode_5_max_watt: Mode 5 Max Watt (Leave empty if this is your final highest mode)
data.mode_6_max_watt: Mode 6 Max Watt (Catches everything above the previous threshold)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WattWatcher
reconfigure.description: Adjust the source power sensor or fine-tune the maximum watt thresholds for your operational modes.

error.overlapping_thresholds: Invalid order! Each Max Watt threshold must be strictly higher than the previous one (e.g., Mode 2 Watt > Mode 1 Watt).

init.title: WattWatcher Options
init.description: Adjust the source power sensor or fine-tune the maximum watt thresholds for your operational modes.

error.overlapping_thresholds: Invalid order! Each Max Watt threshold must be strictly higher than the previous one (e.g., Mode 2 Watt > Mode 1 Watt).
